description: Waterfall Claude OS — canonical catalog of every skill across the Waterfall Technologies platform. Source of truth lives in the Waterfall-Claude-OS repo (assets/global/registry.json), which also holds a full mirror of every skill (.claude/skills + .agents/skills) and the portable waterfall-skills bundle. `installed_in` is where a skill physically ships (loaded by Claude Code from that repo's .claude/skills or .agents/skills); `applies_to` is where it is relevant. OS-core skills ship in every repo. Any app-repo catalog (e.g. cairo-ai-pro/app-assets/global) is a superseded mirror.

agents.name: audio-measurement-reviewer
agents.description: Review RTA Insight Pro changes for measurement correctness and the warm-studio design contract — verifies DSP math (windowing, bin math, A/C/Z weighting formulas, RT60 fit, coherence gating), measurement-grade getUserMedia constraints, SSR-safe browser-global guarding, and that no neon-green palette regressions slip in; runs the three audio skills' scanner scripts.
agents.integration_notes: Tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash. Scoped to the audio-analyzer app. Orchestrates the three audio skills' scanners (check-dsp.sh, scan-audio-io.sh, scan-palette.sh) as part of its review.
agents.recommended_usage: When reviewing a PR or change to audio-analyzer for DSP/measurement correctness, input-capture safety, or design-system conformance.

agents.name: live-sound-tuning-advisor
agents.description: Assistive agent that walks a user through tuning a PA, aligning monitors, or measuring a room with RTA Insight Pro's transfer-function and impulse-response workflows — scopes the rig (measurement mic vs. built-in, reference-signal access, subs+tops vs. single system), guides pink-noise capture, delay/phase alignment, and coherence-gated EQ, and interprets RT60/clarity/intelligibility in plain language with concrete numbers. Assistive, never prescriptive; no hearing-safety advice.
agents.integration_notes: Tools: Read, Grep, Glob, Bash. Scoped to RTA Insight Pro. Composes the three Smaart-parity audio skills into a guided live-sound/room measurement session.
agents.recommended_usage: When a user wants help capturing a real measurement and acting on it — PA tuning, monitor ring-out, sub/top alignment, or RT60/clarity interpretation.

skills.name: active-risk-monitoring
skills.description: Build the “active insurance” moat — continuous signal ingestion (IoT, telematics, scans, weather) → a live risk score → proactive prevention alerts that lower loss frequency, plus telematics onboarding and transparent dynamic pricing.
skills.integration_notes: The loss-frequency moat (Coalition/Hippo/Root patterns). Monitoring agent routes through the Super Agent (HAIKU for signal classification, SONNET/OPUS for narrative); risk math is deterministic. Feeds insurance-unit-economics (loss ratio) and dynamic pricing. Sequence Phase 3 after claims-automation + insurance-unit-economics. Diff 5.
skills.recommended_usage: When building IoT/sensor integration, telematics onboarding, a risk dashboard, prevention alerts, or usage-based/dynamic pricing.

skills.name: add-route
skills.description: Add a TanStack Router route the safe way — scaffold under src/routes/ and regenerate routeTree.gen.ts with the generator, never by hand.
skills.integration_notes: Stack-specific to TanStack Start file-based routing; not portable to react-router apps (waterfall-nexus).
skills.recommended_usage: Adding a page, nested/layout route, or API/server route in cairo-ai-pro.

skills.name: audio-device-integration
skills.description: Guide and audit safe Web Audio / MediaDevices integration for the RTA Insight Pro analyzer — device enumeration, measurement-grade getUserMedia constraints (autoGainControl, echoCancellation, noiseSuppression all false), sample-rate negotiation, USB / class-compliant interface handling, AudioContext / AudioWorklet capture, SSR-safe guarding of window / navigator / AudioContext, and graceful permission-denied / empty-device fallbacks.
skills.integration_notes: Ships scan-audio-io.sh: flags getUserMedia calls that don't disable AGC/echo/noise (a measurement-accuracy bug) and unguarded top-level AudioContext / navigator.mediaDevices access (an SSR hazard); exits non-zero on findings, no-ops cleanly when audio-analyzer/frontend is absent. Pairs with audio-dsp-measurement and the audio-measurement-reviewer agent.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing microphone/input capture, a device picker, the audio input pipeline, the getUserMedia permission flow, or interface selection.

skills.name: audio-dsp-measurement
skills.description: Guide and validate the DSP/measurement layer of the RTA Insight Pro audio analyzer — FFT sizing & windowing, fractional-octave smoothing (1/1–1/24), A/C/Z frequency weighting, SPL / Leq / time-weighting, RT60 via Schroeder backward integration (T20/T30/EDT), and dual-channel transfer function (magnitude, phase, coherence with gating); explains the math, the pitfalls, and how the app's frontend/src/lib/dsp modules are structured and tested.
skills.integration_notes: Ships check-dsp.sh: verifies the expected dsp modules (fft, octave, weighting, spl, rt60, transfer) and their *.test.ts exist, exits non-zero on a gap so the measurement core stays test-covered. No-ops cleanly when the dsp dir is absent. Feeds the audio-measurement-reviewer agent.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing FFT, spectrum, octave-band, SPL meter, reverberation time, or transfer-function / coherence code, when numbers look wrong, or before shipping the DSP layer.

skills.name: cairo-global-asset-manager
skills.description: Ingest, classify, integrate, and maintain global assets (agents, skills, tools, workflows, templates) under app-assets/global/ and this registry.
skills.integration_notes: Admin-only. Manages the canonical OS catalog, which now lives in Waterfall-Claude-OS/assets/global/ (the cairo-ai-pro/app-assets/global copy is a superseded mirror). The waterfall-os skill is the platform-facing entry point that references it.
skills.recommended_usage: When an admin adds an external asset to the platform or audits the global asset library.

skills.name: ci-cd-conventions
skills.description: Add or modify GitHub Actions workflows compatible with the Bun + Cloudflare Workers edge build.
skills.integration_notes: Cairo CI specifics (Bun, Cloudflare). Generalize before reuse in npm/vitest repos like waterfall-tech-command.
skills.recommended_usage: Editing .github/workflows or adding lint/typecheck/build/preview jobs in cairo-ai-pro.

skills.name: claims-automation
skills.description: Agentic claims pipeline — conversational FNOL → ML triage → AI damage estimate → instant payout — Super-Agent-routed, with the invariant that the fraud/deepfake gate runs BEFORE any auto-payout. Audit exits non-zero on HIGH (CI gate).
skills.integration_notes: Orchestrates (does not replace) insurance-claims-ux (UX) and fraud-deepfake-guard (media gate). Load-bearing invariant: no auto-payout path without a preceding fraud gate — the audit fails CI on violation. The margin lever measured by insurance-unit-economics automation rate. Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: When building a file-a-claim flow, claims console, FNOL bot, auto-adjudication, or instant-payout path.

skills.name: coi-live-certificate
skills.description: Generate real-time Certificates of Insurance from live policy data + a tamper-evident public verification endpoint so a holder can confirm coverage is active and unrevoked. Eliminates the COI request bottleneck (Next Insurance Live Certificate pattern).
skills.integration_notes: Generation is deterministic templating; parsing an uploaded sample cert routes through idp-intake-agent (Super Agent). Emits certificate.issued on the embedded-insurance-sdk event bus. Diff 3.
skills.recommended_usage: Building COI generation, proof-of-coverage, real-time certificate issuance, or holder verification.

skills.name: embedded-insurance-sdk
skills.description: Partner-facing embedded insurance SDK — quote->bind widget + headless REST/GraphQL API. Upgraded with an MCP server, multi-carrier appetite routing, vertical point-of-sale templates, episodic/parametric coverage, and instant multi-rail payout.
skills.integration_notes: Primary distribution lever for the embedded-MGA model. Emits the policy/claim/payment event bus that insurance-unit-economics and active-risk-monitoring consume.
skills.recommended_usage: Building or integrating the partner embedded SDK, co-brand widget, or headless insurance API.

skills.name: fraud-deepfake-guard
skills.description: Detect AI-generated/synthetic-media fraud in claim uploads and wire forensic detection into the upload pipeline. Upgraded to a holistic 0-100 claim fraud score (media + narrative-deception + behavioral/identity). Exits non-zero on HIGH (CI gate).
skills.integration_notes: The fraud gate consumed by claims-automation (fraud-gate-before-payout invariant). CI gate retained; holistic score extends, never relaxes it.
skills.recommended_usage: Reviewing claim-upload security, before a release, or after adding a claims-media path.

skills.name: github-integration-authoring
skills.description: Add or modify a GitHub action/trigger in Cairo's GitHub integration (src/lib/integrations/github) — REST actions, event triggers, schemas, manifest.
skills.integration_notes: Tied to cairo-ai-pro's integration layout.
skills.recommended_usage: Implementing new REST-backed GitHub actions or event triggers in cairo-ai-pro.

skills.name: github-webhook-security
skills.description: Implement or review inbound webhook handlers — verify X-Hub-Signature-256, process repository events safely.
skills.integration_notes: Mechanics (HMAC verify, constant-time compare) are portable; paths reference cairo /api/public/* routes.
skills.recommended_usage: Adding webhook receivers or verifying signatures in cairo-ai-pro.

skills.name: gui-animation
skills.description: Choose and implement GUI animation for fintech/insurance web apps — Motion (Framer Motion) for UI transitions, GSAP for complex timelines/scroll, Lottie for micro-interactions — with trust-building motion principles and prefers-reduced-motion accessibility.
skills.integration_notes: Shared OS skill. The motion engine all insurance UI patterns defer to (timeline, risk gauge, payout confirmation). Always paired with insurance-accessibility.
skills.recommended_usage: Adding animation/micro-interactions/loading states, or picking an animation library.

skills.name: idp-intake-agent
skills.description: Intelligent document processing — OCR + LLM classification + field extraction with per-field confidence + human-in-the-loop correction — for COIs, ACORD forms, applications, policy docs. Reuses the fraud-deepfake-guard guarded upload pipeline (forensics first, then extraction).
skills.integration_notes: One pipeline, two passes (forensics then extraction). Writes structured records to coi-live-certificate and underwriting-agent. All extraction routes through the Super Agent. Diff 3.
skills.recommended_usage: Building a COI upload/analyzer, ACORD parser, document classifier, or OCR extraction pipeline.

skills.name: impulse-response-metrics
skills.description: Impulse Response (IR) mode acoustics for RTA Insight Pro's Studio edition (Smaart Suite parity) — RT60 via Schroeder backward integration (T20/T30), EDT, the clarity/definition family (C50, C80, D50), centre time Ts, and STI / %ALcons speech-intelligibility estimates from a measured or loaded impulse response, with IR windowing/Lundeby truncation, the ETC / log-time display, and interpretation thresholds.
skills.integration_notes: Ships check-ir-metrics.sh: flags a missing ir-metrics DSP module and its *.test.ts and warns when the rt60/edt/c50/c80/d50/sti functions appear absent. No-ops cleanly when the dsp dir is absent. Mirrors Smaart v9 Suite IR mode; pairs with the live-sound-tuning-advisor agent and audio-dsp-measurement.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing IR-mode acoustics, RT60/EDT/clarity/intelligibility code, ETC/log-time display, or interpreting room-acoustics numbers.

skills.name: insurance-accessibility
skills.description: Make insurance web/app flows WCAG 2.1 AA conformant — form labels, focus order, color contrast, alt text, language declaration, keyboard operability, prefers-reduced-motion — with a static scanner.
skills.integration_notes: Shared OS skill. Regulatory bar for insurance (HHS rule). Gates every brand-facing widget; wire into CI.
skills.recommended_usage: Building or reviewing any quote/claims/policy flow, before a release, or any a11y/WCAG/ADA check.

skills.name: insurance-claims-ux
skills.description: Design and audit the claims experience — FNOL intake, consolidated single-screen status, error-resistant adjuster tooling, document/photo upload. Upgraded with timeline UI, AI damage photo capture, instant-payout confirmation, resumable upload.
skills.integration_notes: Insurance UX; the claimant/adjuster surfaces for the claims-automation pipeline. Photo capture feeds claims-automation after the fraud-deepfake-guard gate.
skills.recommended_usage: Building or reviewing a file-a-claim, claim-tracking, or claims console flow.

skills.name: insurance-compliance
skills.description: Pre-integration compliance checklist + scanner for an embedded-MGA — SOC 2 Type II, NAIC Insurance Data Security Model Law, state rate/form filings, NAIC FACTS AI governance, WCAG 2.1 AA, and capacity-concentration risk.
skills.integration_notes: Gating for the roadmap (brands won't integrate without SOC 2 + infosec program). AI-decision explainability enforced via underwriting-agent + claims-automation audit trail; accessibility via insurance-accessibility. Diff 3.
skills.recommended_usage: Preparing for brand integration, before a capacity-partner review, or any SOC2/NAIC/AI-governance check.

skills.name: insurance-mcp-server
skills.description: Expose the insurance platform (quote, bind, endorse, cancel, FNOL, COI issue/verify, status) as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server so AI agents and brand copilots transact insurance directly — the Phase-3 agentic distribution surface (Sure pattern).
skills.integration_notes: Sits IN FRONT of embedded-insurance-sdk's headless API (delegates, never reimplements). Partner-scoped auth + idempotency on bind/payout. The MCP server makes no AI calls itself; any AI it triggers routes through the Super Agent. Phase 3. Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Building an MCP server / Model Context Protocol integration, AI-agent insurance distribution, or quote/bind/claim MCP tools.

skills.name: insurance-product-factory
skills.description: Define a new insurance line/product by declarative, schema-validated config (coverage, rating, eligibility, forms, lifecycle, carrier) — not bespoke code — so the platform ships dozens of micro-products without an engineering cycle per line (ZhongAn config-driven scale).
skills.integration_notes: Config drives quote-flow, embedded-insurance-sdk, underwriting-agent, multi-carrier-routing, and parametric-coverage at runtime; rating/decisions stay explainable and filings stay versioned/effective-dated (ties to insurance-compliance). AI may draft a config but the runtime interpreting it is deterministic. Phase 3. Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Launching a new product/line, authoring product configuration, a rating config, product templates, or no-code line definitions.

skills.name: insurance-quote-flow
skills.description: Design and audit insurance quote/quoting flows for conversion — progressive disclosure, preliminary quote after minimal input, save-and-continue, under-5-minute completion. Upgraded with an agentic conversational quote layer + data-prefill-first.
skills.integration_notes: Insurance UX. Upgrade adds a Super-Agent-routed conversational quote and data-prefill-first (Branch pattern) over the deterministic wizard; feeds insurance-unit-economics attach rate.
skills.recommended_usage: Building or reviewing a quote wizard, get-a-quote funnel, or onboarding-to-bind flow.

skills.name: insurance-unit-economics
skills.description: Instrument the six embedded-MGA unit-economics metrics — loss ratio, combined ratio, take/ceding commission, CAC & LTV/CAC, attach rate, automation rate — as live, A/B-testable dashboards. Scaffolds a typed metrics module + dashboard; audits whether each KPI is computed.
skills.integration_notes: Instrument-first: ships before the agentic features so claims-automation and active-risk-monitoring have a scoreboard. KPI math is deterministic; any narrative/anomaly/projection routes through the Super Agent. Derives from the policy/claim event log emitted by embedded-insurance-sdk. Diff 2.
skills.recommended_usage: When building partner/admin dashboards, before a board/capacity-partner review, or whenever asked about loss ratio, combined ratio, attach rate, take rate, LTV/CAC, or automation rate.

skills.name: multi-carrier-routing
skills.description: Route each risk across a panel of capacity partners by appetite — widens bindable risk and de-risks capacity concentration. Per-carrier appetite rules + caps, deterministic ranking (eligibility, price, profit-share, remaining capacity), concentration-cap enforcement, and a why-this-carrier audit trail.
skills.integration_notes: Consumes underwriting-agent appetite eval; emits the selected carrier into the bind path. Enforces max % GWP per carrier (the §6 capacity-concentration risk). Routing is deterministic; appetite-text interpretation routes through the Super Agent. Phase 3 (NEXT Connect). Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Building a carrier-panel bind engine, appetite matching across capacity partners, or capacity-concentration limits.

skills.name: parametric-coverage
skills.description: Build parametric and episodic on/off coverage as first-class lifecycle objects — index-triggered instant payout, pay-per-use micro-duration, threshold/oracle-driven claims with no loss-adjustment step. Trigger definition + deterministic evaluator + oracle-data validity gate + automatic payout on trigger.fired.
skills.integration_notes: Disburses via the claims-automation instant-payout rail; consumes active-risk-monitoring signals/oracles; lifecycle/events on the embedded-insurance-sdk bus. Oracle data is validity-checked before payout (no naked auto-disbursement); triggers disclosed at bind. Phase 3 (Goose / Cover Genius XClaim). Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Building parametric insurance, index-triggered payout, episodic/on-off coverage, pay-per-use, or instant payout without loss adjustment.

skills.name: partner-service-copilot
skills.description: RAG copilot serving the brand's support team AND the end customer — retrieves over policy + benefit docs + live claim state, answers in plain language, and hands off to a human with full pre-summarized context (never a cold transfer).
skills.integration_notes: Calls policy-semantic-search for cited clause lookups; the multi-source, multi-turn assistant (Oscar Oswell pattern). Streaming chat UI gated by gui-animation + insurance-accessibility. Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Building a support copilot, coverage-explanation engine, agent-assist, or claims self-service.

skills.name: performance-optimizer
skills.description: Static performance profiling — Supabase over-fetch/N+1, missing limits, TanStack Query caching, bundle/latency smells — with a before/after report and score.
skills.integration_notes: perf-scan.sh is git-root-relative and grep-based; React + Supabase oriented. Installed on the React-heavy apps.
skills.recommended_usage: When something feels slow, before a release, or when asked to profile/optimize.

skills.name: policy-semantic-search
skills.description: NL search over a policyholder's own policy docs — embed clauses/endorsements -> retrieve -> grounded answer WITH clause citation + confidence + human fallback; never answers uncited. Also semantic policy comparison across carriers.
skills.integration_notes: Shares its retrieval layer with partner-service-copilot. Strict citation enforcement; escalates below a confidence threshold. Super-Agent-routed. Diff 3.
skills.recommended_usage: Building NL policy search, a cited coverage Q&A surface, clause retrieval, or policy comparison.

skills.name: preview-doctor
skills.description: Diagnose and fix Lovable preview failures for a TanStack Start app — Node built-ins in the client graph, stale routeTree.gen.ts, asset/import hazards.
skills.integration_notes: Specific to TanStack Start + Lovable dev preview.
skills.recommended_usage: When the Lovable preview misbehaves or before handing a build to preview.

skills.name: release-and-deploy
skills.description: Understand the deploy target and secret promotion — Cloudflare Workers (wrangler.jsonc), env/secret promotion, published vs preview URLs.
skills.integration_notes: Cloudflare Workers specific.
skills.recommended_usage: Configuring deploys or promoting secrets between dev and prod in cairo-ai-pro.

skills.name: repo-hygiene
skills.description: OS-core. Maintain GitHub repo governance — CODEOWNERS, PR templates, branch protection, conventional PRs, and (for Lovable-synced repos) the two-way sync caveats.
skills.integration_notes: OS-core: installed in every Waterfall repo. Generalized from cairo-only (moved from .agents/skills to .claude/skills); Lovable-sync section is marked as applying only to Lovable-synced repos.
skills.recommended_usage: Setting up repository governance or advising on PR/branch workflow.

skills.name: security-monitor
skills.description: Static security sweep — RLS coverage, SSRF guards, secret leakage, permissive policies, webhook signature checks, browser-hostile imports. Exits non-zero on HIGH/CRITICAL.
skills.integration_notes: scan.sh is git-root-relative and no-ops on absent dirs (supabase/migrations, src/routes), so it ships safely to any repo with app source. Usable as a CI gate.
skills.recommended_usage: Before a release, after adding a connector/migration, or when asked to scan/check security.

skills.name: spl-logging-leq
skills.description: SPL metering & logging parity for RTA Insight Pro's SPL / Studio editions (Smaart SPL parity) — A/C/Z frequency weighting, Fast/Slow/Impulse time-weighting, equivalent level (Leq), Lmax/Lmin, statistical percentiles (L10/L90/Ln), sound-exposure/dose framing (measurement only, no hearing-health advice), multiple simultaneous meters with custom metrics, session logging cadence, and a CSV/JSON export schema for logged SPL.
skills.integration_notes: Ships check-spl-logging.sh: flags missing SPL logging / Leq support in the frontend SPL view and lib; no-ops cleanly when targets absent. Mirrors Smaart SPL/Suite metering+logging.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing SPL metering, an SPL logger, Leq/percentile computation, multi-meter views, custom metrics, or show-compliance logging and export.

skills.name: supabase-feature
skills.description: Add a Supabase-backed feature securely — scaffold a migration with RLS enabled + owner-scoped policies, plus a matching authenticated server accessor (TanStack server function or Deno Edge Function).
skills.integration_notes: Generalized: shared RLS migration (new-migration.sh is git-root-relative) plus two server-accessor variants — TanStack server fn (cairo-ai-pro) and Deno Edge Function (Lovable-Cloud apps like waterfall-nexus).
skills.recommended_usage: Adding a new table or any server code that reads/writes user data on a Supabase app.

skills.name: superagent-conformance
skills.description: Enforce THE ONE RULE — every AI call routes through the Super Agent. Static sweep for raw provider-API fetches, direct provider SDK use, hardcoded model strings, and manual token caps in app code; refactor to the approved superAgent/useAgent/shim patterns. Exits non-zero on HIGH.
skills.integration_notes: scan.sh is git-root-relative and no-ops cleanly (exit 0) when there's no src/. The model-access engine is allowlisted by default (src/agent, any superAgent file, src/lib/ai, *.gen.*); a repo extends it via .claude/skills/superagent-conformance/allowlist.txt — cairo-ai-pro ships one scoping its model-router/billing/BYOK/model-studio domain so only true consumer-app violations flag. Usable as a CI gate. Follow-up: install in waterfall-nexus (out of session scope).
skills.recommended_usage: Reviewing AI/LLM code, before a release, after adding an AI feature or connector, or when asked to check conformance / the one rule / model strings / token caps.

skills.name: task-planner
skills.description: OS-core. Decompose any goal into a dependency-aware plan and route each subtask to a skill that actually exists. The orchestration layer of the Waterfall Claude OS.
skills.integration_notes: OS-core: installed in every Waterfall repo. Routing reflects each repo's installed set via list-skills.sh.
skills.recommended_usage: Multi-step or multi-domain requests, or whenever a request spans more than one skill.

skills.name: tool-authoring
skills.description: Author, register, and wire a new Cairo AI tool (AITool interface) in src/lib/ai/tools/registry.ts.
skills.integration_notes: Tied to cairo-ai-pro's AI tool registry. Tools must route AI through the Super Agent, never call models directly.
skills.recommended_usage: Adding or modifying a tool exposed to Cairo agents.

skills.name: transfer-function-workflow
skills.description: The Smaart-style dual-FFT system-tuning workflow for RTA Insight Pro — drive the system with pink noise, set reference vs. measurement channels, find and compensate the inter-channel delay (cross-correlation / delay locator), then read magnitude, phase, and coherence to make EQ/level/delay decisions and verify. Covers step order, coherence gating, sub/top phase alignment, averaging strategy, and the common mistakes.
skills.integration_notes: Ships check-transfer.sh: flags a missing transfer-function or delay-finder DSP module and its *.test.ts; no-ops cleanly when the dir is absent. Mirrors Smaart v9 Real-Time transfer function; pairs with the live-sound-tuning-advisor agent.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing the transfer-function/signal-generator/delay-finder workflow, aligning a PA, time-aligning subs and tops, or interpreting a coherence trace.

skills.name: underwriting-agent
skills.description: STP underwriting agent — risk inputs + enrichment -> appetite/rules eval -> ML risk score -> decision (bind|refer|decline) + a plain-language, auditable explanation. Super-Agent-routed; escalates ambiguous risk to a human with rationale.
skills.integration_notes: Consumes the active-risk-monitoring risk score; feeds insurance-unit-economics. Explanations satisfy NAIC FACTS / insurance-compliance. Diff 4.
skills.recommended_usage: Building AI-guided underwriting, an STP bind engine, an appetite rules evaluator, or refer/decline flow.

skills.name: video-production
skills.description: Plan and produce video for insurance onboarding, education, and claims — explainer/animated video, transcript-based editing, and AI-personalized policyholder video for onboarding & claim-status.
skills.integration_notes: Shared OS skill. Personalized claim-status video pairs with insurance-claims-ux to remove where's-my-claim calls.
skills.recommended_usage: Scripting, producing, or planning explainer/onboarding/claims video, or generating a video brief.

skills.name: warm-studio-ui
skills.description: Define and enforce the warm-studio design system for RTA Insight Pro — a warm violet-tinted dark palette (ink #0C0A12, panel #16121C, amber #F6A623, rose #FF6B8A, violet #A855F7, teal #2DD4BF), gradient hero text (amber→rose→violet), subtle film grain, soft glows, monospace numeric readouts, a mobile-first bottom-nav layout, and accessibility (prefers-reduced-motion, contrast). Central rule: NO tech/neon green.
skills.integration_notes: Ships scan-palette.sh: greps the frontend and tailwind.config.ts for forbidden neon-green hex codes and green-(300|400|500|600) Tailwind utilities, printing offenders and exiting non-zero. Safe as a CI gate; no-ops cleanly when the frontend is absent.
skills.recommended_usage: When building or reviewing UI, theming, the Tailwind config, color tokens, charts/meters, the spectrum/SPL readouts, or layout for the audio analyzer, or whenever a green hex creeps in.

skills.name: waterfall-os
skills.description: OS-core. The Waterfall Claude OS entry point — platform contract (route every AI call through the Super Agent), where this registry lives, installed skill set, and the add/unify-a-skill workflow.
skills.integration_notes: OS-core: installed in every Waterfall repo. Source of truth for the platform contract and the catalog pointer.
skills.recommended_usage: First skill to consult when landing in any Waterfall repo.

skills.name: waterfall-super-agent
skills.description: The Waterfall Super Agent — the one governed LLM gateway every app routes through (superAgent.call), the taskType→tier model routing (OPUS/SONNET/HAIKU) with concrete slugs centralized in TIER_MODELS, the production gateway guarantees (ordered tier fallback + retry, short-TTL result cache, per-call observability telemetry), the budget rails, the brain-contract eval gate, and the composed capability layers (multi-agent orchestration, deterministic workflows, autonomy envelope, knowledge-graph memory). The orchestrator's catalog of the brain; pairs with superagent-conformance (the enforcer).
skills.integration_notes: Documents the capability surface of the Super Agent (Cairo is the brain). Concrete model slugs live only in TIER_MODELS inside superAgent.functions.ts; app code names a taskType, never a model. Pairs with superagent-conformance (enforcer) and waterfall-os (platform map).
skills.recommended_usage: Read before building or reviewing any AI feature in a Waterfall app — for the single gateway entry point, the tier doctrine, and Patterns E/F/G.
